creator: mrfeed@yahoo.com
text:
i think this problem never get solved since FreeBSD 4.1 - I have the same problem in FreeBSD 4.3 stable, i.e. set timeout has not effects whatsoever if linked with libc_r. Do you guys have any plan to do something about it?

thanks.
